body:
Anna, it was so good to catch up with you at the [Breakthrough Energy Summit](events/breakthrough-energy-summit) last week — your panel remarks on patient capital in grid infrastructure really stuck with me. I've been thinking more about what you said regarding the tension between fund timelines and the long deployment cycles these climate hardware companies actually need, and I think it's reshaping how we're structuring our new vehicle at [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital). I'd love to get another hour with you before the end of the month, ideally to walk through our updated thesis and get your honest read on where we might be missing something. You've always had a way of surfacing the blind spots I don't even know I have, and I genuinely value that. Would a call the week of April 28th work for you?

Amara
